content:
# Clogging

**Summary**: The reduction of permeability in porous media due to the accumulation of solid particles.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] investigated clogging as a major hindrance to the use of artificial recharge.

## Scientific Context

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] Clogging is a critical technical challenge for managed aquifer recharge (MAR) systems.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] Analyzed via column experiments and microscopic characterization of particles.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Calcite precipitation and redissolution were identified as the major contributors to clogging. ([[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026, p. 17]])

## Contrasting Values and Interpretations

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] Significant difference between TWW1 and TWW2 at 3.2 mL/min pumping rate.
